li.xpath: /Defs/RecipeDef[defName="VBE_MakeCoffee" or defName="VBE_MakeTea" or defName="VBE_MakeCoffeeFast" or defName="VBE_ReheatCoffee" or defName="VBE_BrewLatteCoffee" or defName="VBE_BrewMochaCoffee" or defName="VBE_BrewIrishCoffee" or defName="VBE_BrewCannibalCoffee" or defName="VBE_MakeTeaFast" or defName="VBE_MakeBlackTea" or defName="VBE_MakeYuenYeung" or defName="VBE_MakeKombucha" or defName="VBE_BrewLemonCoffee" or defName="VBE_MakeLemonTea" or defName="VBE_MakeEarlGreyTea"]/recipeUsers
